workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Organize your projects, plugins, and data warehouses by organization.
workspaces.no_workspaces_description: Create your first workspace to organize your projects.
workspaces.create_dialog_description: A workspace groups projects under an organization.
workspaces.delete_workspace_description: This will permanently delete the workspace. Projects will become unassigned.
workspaces.delete_workspace_confirm: Type the workspace name to confirm
workspaces.unassigned_description: Projects not assigned to any workspace
workspaces.organization_shared_note: To edit organization details, go to Settings > Organizations. Changes apply to all linked workspaces.
workspaces.badges_description: Add labels to categorize this workspace.

home.hero_description: Build research projects on OMOP data, create dashboards, run statistical analyses, and share your work — all from a single platform.
home.no_recent_projects_description: Create your first research project to get started.
home.no_recent_workspaces_description: Create your first workspace to organize your projects.

projects.title: Projects
projects.no_projects_description: Create your first project to start working with your data.
projects.create_dialog_description: Set up a new research project. You can configure datasets and plugins later.

dashboard.empty_description: Add widgets to visualize your data. Drag and drop to arrange your dashboard.
dashboard.add_widget_description: Choose a widget to add to the current tab.
dashboard.widget_no_dataset: No dataset configured for this dashboard.
dashboard.custom_code_description: Write custom {{language}} code for this widget
dashboard.show_widget_titles_hint: When disabled, title bars are hidden in view mode.
dashboard.dashboards_description: Create and manage data dashboards for this project.
dashboard.create_dialog_description: Give your dashboard a name and optionally bind it to a dataset.
dashboard.no_dashboards_description: Create a dashboard to visualize your datasets.
dashboard.delete_confirm_description: This will permanently delete the dashboard and all its widgets.
dashboard.field_dataset_hint: Widgets can use data from this dataset. You can also change it later.
dashboard.settings_description: Configure the dataset and filter columns for this dashboard.
dashboard.settings_filters_hint: Select which columns appear in the filter sidebar.
dashboard.settings_filters_no_dataset: Select a dataset first to configure filters.
dashboard.plugin_configure_description: Configure the plugin settings before adding it as a widget.
dashboard.delete_tab_description: This will permanently delete the tab "{{name}}" and all its widgets.
dashboard.delete_widget_description: This will permanently delete the widget "{{name}}".

concepts.title: Concepts
concepts.description: Browse the concepts defined in your database.
concepts.no_data_source_description: Add a database to browse concepts.
concepts.no_concept_table: No concept table found in the data source.
concepts.stats_no_records: No records found for this concept.
concepts.select_concept: Select a concept to view details.

databases.title: Databases
databases.description: Manage database connections for the data warehouse.
databases.no_databases_description: Connect a database or data file to start exploring your data.
databases.type_database_desc: DuckDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, or SQL Server
databases.type_fhir_desc: Connect to a FHIR R4 endpoint
databases.edit_dialog_description: Update name, description, or schema preset.
databases.current_files_hint: Upload new files below to replace, or leave empty to keep current files.
databases.remove_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to remove this database? This will delete all associated files and cached statistics.
databases.upload_drop_hint: Click to browse or drag and drop
databases.select_folder_hint: Select a folder containing Parquet files
databases.no_vocabulary: No vocabulary configured for this database.
databases.no_vocabulary_hint: Select a schema preset with vocabulary support (e.g. OMOP CDM 5.4) to browse concepts.
databases.stats_no_data: No statistics available. Connect the database first.
databases.size_warning: Large files detected ({{size}}). Data will be copied into browser storage.
databases.size_warning_danger: Files too large for browser storage ({{size}}).
databases.size_warning_hint: Use Chrome or Edge for direct file access without copying.
databases.size_warning_blocked: Import blocked: files exceed browser storage limits. Use Chrome or Edge for direct access.
databases.import_mode_direct: Direct access — no data copied into the browser
databases.create_from_preset_description: Create an empty database with the table structure defined by a schema preset (DDL).
databases.no_presets_with_ddl: No presets with DDL available. Add a DDL to a preset in the Schema Presets page.

reports.title: Reports
reports.coming_soon_description: Create and publish HTML reports, documents, and presentations from your analyses.

data_quality.title: Data Quality
data_quality.description: Check and validate data quality in your warehouse.
data_quality.coming_soon_description: This page will provide data quality checks and validation reports for your warehouse data.

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.no_cohorts_description: Create your first cohort to define patient populations for your analyses.
cohorts.editor_description: Define criteria to select a population from your data.
cohorts.field_level_description: The unit of analysis for this cohort.
cohorts.remove_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to delete this cohort? This action cannot be undone.

datasets.new_folder_description: Create a folder to organize your datasets.
datasets.new_analysis_description: Create an analysis for this dataset.
datasets.upload_description: Upload a CSV, Excel, or Parquet file to create a new dataset.

datasets.upload_no_columns: No columns found in the file.

datasets.no_files: No datasets yet. Create a dataset or upload a file.
datasets.select_or_create: Select a dataset from the tree, or create a new one.
datasets.add_columns_hint: Upload data or add columns to get started.
datasets.no_analyses_select_dataset: Select a dataset to see its analyses.
datasets.analysis_type_table1_desc: Descriptive statistics table: counts, percentages, mean ± SD for each variable.

datasets.select_column_stats: Click a column header to see statistics.
datasets.unsaved_changes_description: This dataset has unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

datasets.crosstab_select_both: Select both row and column variables to generate the cross-tabulation.

datasets.analysis_no_result: Run the analysis to see results.

datasets.analysis_name_exists: An analysis with this name already exists.
datasets.import_settings_description: Change how this file is parsed and re-import the data.
datasets.import_settings_no_raw: No source file stored. Re-upload the file to change import settings.

transforms.title: Transforms
transforms.description: Transform warehouse data into wide-format datasets.
transforms.coming_soon_description: This page will allow you to write scripts that transform OMOP/FHIR data into wide-format tables for analysis.

patient_data.no_data_source_description: Add a database with a patient table to browse patient records.

patient_data.widget_clinical_table_desc: Table of clinical data with concepts and timestamps.
patient_data.widget_medications_desc: List of medications (drug exposures) for the patient.
patient_data.widget_diagnoses_desc: List of diagnoses (conditions) for the patient.
patient_data.settings_description: Configure display options for the patient data page.
patient_data.widget_notes_desc: Document viewer for clinical notes (discharge summaries, progress notes, etc.).
patient_data.no_note_table: No note/text table in this database.

versioning.description: Version control and export your project.

versioning.import_drop: Drop a ZIP file here or click to browse
versioning.coming_soon_description: Version control will let you track changes, create snapshots, and synchronize your project with a remote Git repository.

reset.title: Reset all local data
reset.description: This will permanently delete all data stored in your browser:

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.description: Browse and install projects, plugins, and tools shared by research teams.
catalog.coming_soon_description: Discover content published by research teams, each from their own Git repository.

catalog.unlisted_description: Published to git but hidden from the catalog browser.

wiki.description: Hierarchical markdown documentation for your team.

app_warehouse.title: Data Warehouse
app_warehouse.description: Manage databases, schema presets, concept mappings, and ETL pipelines.
app_warehouse.databases_placeholder: Database management will be available here.
app_warehouse.concept_mapping_description: Map source concepts to standard vocabularies (SNOMED, LOINC, RxNorm) using OHDSI Athena and UMLS dictionaries.
app_warehouse.etl_description: Build and manage Extract-Transform-Load pipelines to convert source data into OMOP CDM format.
app_warehouse.link_database_description: Choose a database to link to this project.
app_warehouse.no_available_databases_description: Create a new database first from the Data Warehouse page.
app_warehouse.delete_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to delete this database? This will remove all associated files and cached statistics. Projects using this database will be unlinked.
app_warehouse.unlink_confirm_description: Unlink this database from the project? The database will remain available in the Data Warehouse.

etl.description: Transform source data into standardized models using SQL scripts.

etl.create_description: Set up a new pipeline to transform source data into a target schema.
etl.no_databases_available: No databases available. Import data in the Databases page first.

etl.copy_select_tooltip: Copy a SELECT query with all columns
etl.profiling_no_source: No source database selected. Choose a source in the pipeline header.

etl.pipeline_click_node: Click a node to view details

app_versioning.description: Manage version control across all your projects and app configuration.
